items.body: Transfer your data, iMessages, photos and more. Use Pixel functions that make switching simple. e-SIM transfer, innovative AI for photos and videos, and your data stays secure.
items.subtitle: Don't settle for less. Make the switch.

items.body: Your Pixel lasts more than 30 hours on a full charge and up to 120 hours with Extreme Battery Saver. Fast charging is built in so you can stay connected.
items.subtitle: Lasts longer than a day, without charging.

items.body: The Google Pixel 10a is built to resist drops, scratches and spills with IP68 protection against water and dust, durable materials and a strong Corning Gorilla Glass 7i screen.
items.subtitle: Lasts for years.

items.body: To protect you and your sensitive data, your Pixel receives regular software updates, making your phone more secure over time.
items.subtitle: 7 years of security and OS updates.

items.body: De nieuwe Google Tensor G5-chip is verantwoordelijk voor de grootste prestatieverbetering tot nu toe in een Pixel. De chip is speciaal ontworpen met een tot wel 60% krachtigere TPU en een maximaal 25% snellere CPU waarmee optimaal gebruik kan worden gemaakt van de krachtige Al-functies van Google.18 Bovendien is de ISP geüpgraded, waardoor foto's en video's op de Pixel de hoogst mogelijke kwaliteit hebben, en gaat de batterij van de Pixel 10 Pro de hele dag mee.
items.subtitle: Lasts longer than a day, without charging.

items.body: Je telefoon wordt na verloop van tijd steeds beter met regelmatige Pixel-functiereleases. Dit zijn automatische updates met nieuwe en verbeterde functies voor onder meer je camera en Gemini waarmee je Pixel nog behulpzamer wordt.15
items.subtitle: Lasts for years.

items.body: Your Pixel receives regular software updates, making your phone more secure over time.
items.subtitle: 7 years of security and OS updates.

paragraphRows.body: JioAir Fibre is built for households that stream, work, and learn at the same time. Typical evening usage—4K on the TV, video calls in the study, and a dozen smart devices in the background—should feel instant, not “good enough.” We publish expected peak-hour performance so you can compare plans on something closer to reality than a lab number.
paragraphRows.title: Speed you can feel every day

paragraphRows.body: Our field teams map your flat or bungalow before drill day: cable paths, power backup, and where the router will actually live. You get a single appointment window, SMS updates, and a walkthrough when we hand over. If something is not right in the first 30 days, we will reschedule a visit at no extra charge.
paragraphRows.title: Installation without the drama

paragraphRows.body: Security is not an afterthought. The home gateway ships with sane defaults: no open admin from the WAN, automatic firmware checks, and optional guest Wi‑Fi that is isolated from your printers and NAS. For families, you can pause devices by profile—school night, dinner, or “everyone outside for an hour.”

We are expanding along high-demand corridors first, then filling in neighbourhoods block by block. Enter your PIN code in the app to see whether you are in a live zone, a waitlist zone, or a planned phase. Waitlisted addresses get notified when the local POP goes live—no need to keep checking the website.
paragraphRows.title: Rural and semi-urban rollout

paragraphRows.body: Plans are calendar-month with GST shown upfront. Overage, if any, is itemised in the bill PDF and in the app. You can switch tiers once per billing cycle; downgrades take effect next cycle, upgrades prorate fairly. Enterprise and society bulk pricing is handled by a separate desk with dedicated SLAs.
paragraphRows.title: Billing that stays predictable

items.body: In most cases, no. If your existing router supports PPPoE or DHCP from the ONT and can handle your plan speed, you can keep it. We supply a Jio gateway by default because it is pre-provisioned and supported end-to-end. Our technician will test throughput to your primary room before closing the ticket.
items.title: Do I need a new router if I already have Wi‑Fi 6?

items.body: The outdoor unit and street fibre stay up; your in-home ONT and router need power. Many customers add a small UPS for the ONT/router pair (roughly 15–25 W). We can recommend compatible models during install. Mobile backup on your phone still works on the Jio network as usual.
items.title: What happens during a power cut?

items.body: Consumer plans use dynamic public IPv4 with optional static IP add-ons where available. If you run a home server, ask about port-forwarding limits and CGNAT vs public IP at order time. Corporate static ranges are sold only on business SKUs with a different contract.
items.title: Can I keep my old email or static IP?

items.body: Porting your landline number (where supported) is 7–10 working days. Pure broadband cutover is usually same day once fibre is lit: we run the new line in parallel, you verify speed, then we help you cancel the old service. Avoid double-billing by aligning your old ISP’s billing date.
items.title: How long does migration from another ISP take?

items.body: Truly unlimited plans have no FUP on download volume for residential use. We may rate-limit only if automated abuse detection flags something that looks like commercial resale or constant 24/7 seeding at line rate. Normal household use—including heavy streaming—is explicitly allowed.
items.title: Is there a fair-use policy?

items.body: Open a ticket in the MyJio app under Help → Broadband → Bill dispute. Attach a screenshot if something looks wrong. SLA for first human response is one business day; most incorrect tax or proration issues are fixed within three. Escalation paths to nodal officers are listed on the legal page.
items.title: Who do I contact for billing disputes?
